item.title: Nebraska Atheist Lawmaker, Megan Hunt, Blocks Abortion Ban
item.description: Her parting shot was fucking beautiful. "And if I go to the Pearly Gates and meet your God someday—which sounds great, I hope I do—I don’t think I’m gonna get in any trouble for killing all of your bills who vote for this. I don’t think your God’s gonna have any problem with that. And I don’t think I’m gonna see any of you there either." Sauce: https://onlysky.media/hemant-mehta/atheist-lawmaker-blocks-anti-abortion-bill-pushed-by-religious-extremists/
item.dc:creator: TheRealSleepIsForChumps

item.title: Disgusting. Not surprising.
item.description: An absolutely disgusting display of hyper-partisan behavior by the Republicans. They're really peeved that they/Mitch didn't get to block another SCOTUS nomination by a Democratic president. They don't seem to understand the US Constitution - but we knew that. Only Romney stood and applauded. It's unclear if Murkowski and Collins, who also voted for Jackson, stayed or left. https://www.indy100.com/politics/republicans-angry-jackson-supreme-court EDIT: Just rewatched - Mitch was the first Republican to get up and walk out.
item.dc:creator: RetrogradeLlama

item.title: Yes!
item.dc:creator: mfrybeasley

item.title: Make this stop..
item.description: Written by Olha Olifirenko “There are no more families in our country whose fates have not been broken by this war. I am half russian and half Ukrainian by blood, but 100% Ukrainian by heart and citizenship. I have never had any russian documents, and yesterday I blocked my russian father and all my relatives from russia everywhere I could. Yesterday was my russian father's birthday. It was his 60th birthday, and I called him to wish him a peaceful sky. He started telling me some bloody russian propaganda, saying it's the Ukrainian army killing civilians in #Bucha (10 km from my house). I said goodbye to him forever and told him it was our last call. On the 39th or 40th day of the war... Blocking your own parents doesn't seem to be something you're not capable of doing. It hurts. But #Bucha, #Mariupol, #Chernihiv, #Irpen, #Kharkiv, #Enerhodar, #Kyiv and #Ukraine hurts more.. ? #standwithukraine” #fuckputin https://www.linkedin.com/posts/olha-olifirenko_bucha-bucha-mariupol-activity-6917218499387875328-T3sZ
item.dc:creator: FredFlipflop

item.title: Happy beer day!

item.title: Real people pay the price
item.description:
Every kid deserves to be an annoying little shit.
Children are being taught implicitly to be afraid. To stay quiet. The regressive right make up boogeymen and use it to scare children.
A good dad is a good dad.
Felt like this should reach as many eyes as possible.
item.dc:creator: TalkingSnake

item.title: I want to meet Rocky, too!
item.dc:creator: PiercedViking

item.title: Spring dress I made a while back!
item.description:
I feel like this dress is cursed. I tried to post it several times when I was done with it but there was always something that didn't work out, gif glitching, pictures didn't come in the right order, submitted to gallery but could then not be seen in gallery. If it doesn't work out again, I know something is up haha.
Anyway, got this beautiful dusty pink velvet fabric at a local fabric store and immediately knew I wanted to make something cute
Skirt part almost done. Added some frills because I love that
The base of the top. I went for a kind of a simplified bustier vibe for it
Top of part almost done! More frills added!
Pinning together bottom and top
The waistline came out a bit uneven, I've fixed that since, just haven't taken any new pictures
Oh, and I added a pentagram! I was looking around everywhere for some elastic bands in the the same shade as the fabric, didn't have any luck, so I went with a dusty lilac instead
I like this dress a lot and have already worn it a few times!
item.dc:creator: Miiaka

item.title: This is without doubt the coolest desk I’ve ever seen.
item.description: This desk has not just unbelievable craftsmanship but the attention to detail and the ‘oh I saw that one coming but damn not that’ experience, I don’t know if it was or is a job for him or for him to sell on? but I love it.
